name: Fruit Waffles with Pineapple Maple Syrup
recipeIngredient: 1 can Dole Pineapple Chunks in juice, drained (20 oz; reserve 3/4 cup juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the maple syrup and cornstarch to a saucepan.
2. Mix well.
3. Cook, stirring until the mixture boils and thickens.
4. Serve over waffles with the pineapple chunks (drained), Dole Mandarin Orange segments, and Dole Raisins.
